raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Vet diwi Wihrī bija Leh-
gerī palikfuschi/ ta weena Wahrdēs
bija Eldadē/ un tas ohtrajs
bija Meedadē Wahrdā/ un tas
Gars diſſeja uṣ teem/ jo tee bija
starp teem uṣrakſtiteem/ jepſchu
tee no Telts ne bija iṣgahjuſchi/
un tee runnaja uṣ Praveefchu
Wiḥsi Lehgerī.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 27,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad tezzeja weens Puifsē/
un stahstija Mohsum/un fazziia:
Eldadē/ un Meedadēs runna Leh-
gerī us Praveefchu Wiḥsi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 28,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad athildeja Josuus
Nunna Dehls/ Mohsus Sul-
lainis/no winna iṣlafiteem Jan-
ekteem/ un fazziia: Mans
Kungs Mohsus/ aisleeds teem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 29,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad fazziia Mohsus us
to: Eſſi tu tas Bahrgotajs
preekſch manni? Ak! kant wiḥsi
KUNGA Laudis Praveefchi
buhtu/ un tas KUNGS fawu
Garru pahr teem dohtu!
"
    },
    {
      "n": 30,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pehz to fapulzejahs Moh-
sus Lehgeri ar teem Israēta Wez-
zajeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 31,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs weens Wehiſch
no ta KUNGA/ un atwedde
Paipales no Juhras/ un kazziia
tahs pahr to Lehgeri/ ſcheit wee-
nu Deenas-Gahjumu/ un tur
weenu Deenas-Gahjumu/ wiṣ-
apkahrt to Lehgeri/ un tahs tik
ne bija dtwi Ohlektis augstuma
pa Semunes wirfu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 32,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad zehlahs tee Laudis
wiṣā tai Deenā/ un wiṣā Mak-
tī/ un wiṣā Rihta Deenā/ un
talaffija Paipales/ un kain wiṣ-
"
    },
    {
      "n": 26,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "masak bija/ tas bija definitis O-
morus falaffijis/ un tee iṣplehte
tahs preekſch jewis apkahrt to
Lehgeri.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 33,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "(Rab nu) ta Galta win-
neem wehl Sohbōs bija/ pirme
ta faſohſta tappē/ tad apſkattahe
ta KUNGA Bahrsiba prett teem
Laudim/ un tas KUNGS fitte
tohs Laudis ar weenu lohti gruh-
tu Mohzibu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 34,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz tappē tahs Wee-
tas Wahrdēs nosaukts Gefahro-
ſchanas-Kappenes/ jo tur aprakke
tee tohs Laudis/ kas bija eekah-
rojuſchees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 35,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "No tahm Gefahroſcha-
nas-Kappenehn aiṣgahje tee Lau-
dis us Azerotu/ un aptettahs
Azerotā.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta XII. Nodalla.
Mirjame un Aārons leppojahs un furne prett
Mohsu: 1. Tadehi tohp tee abbee no Deewa
ſipri aprahti: 4/6. Un Mirjame ar Spitta-
libu fojhita: 10. Bet atkat pehz ſeptin Dee-
nahm us Mohsus Luhgſchanu iſhkisſita:
13/14.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ad runnaja Mirjame
Bun Aārons prett Moh-
su tahs MohruSeewas
deht/ eo wiṣsch nehmis bija/ jo
wiṣsch bija weenu Mohreni par
Seewu nehmis/ un tee fazziia:
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Irrag tas KUNGS tikkat
zaur Mohsu ween runnajis?
neggi tas arridsan zaur mums
runnajis? un tas KUNGS dsir-
deja to.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet tas Wihrs Mohsus
btja tohti lehnpratigs/ watrae ne
ka
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
